text: Last month, I went to Manchester for a work meeting. I booked into a very nice hotel for two nights and I was very happy with it. My room was beautiful and the restaurant served very good food. In fact my dinner there that first night was delicious, but when I came back from my meeting on the second day, I found my room empty. All my things had disappeared. I checked that I was in the right room and then I rushed down to the reception. I was, really worried because I thought I'd been robbed. When I got to the reception, I said my room was empty.
